differentials.name: Lateral / radial collateral ligament complex [Radial collateral ligament]
Lateral ulnar collateral ligament (LUCL): functionally important - resists varus forces
differentials.raw: Lateral ulnar collateral ligament (LUCL): functionally important - resists varus forces

context: Origin:   anteroinferior margin of medial epicondyle (a)  anterior bundle (functionally important): inserts on sublime tubercle (= anteromedial aspect of coronoid process) - resists valgus forces (b)  posterior bundle (c)  transverse (oblique) bundle = Cooper lig. Origin:   inferior margin of lateral epicondyle Insertion:   on annular ligament Insertion:   distal to tubercle of crista supinatoris ulnae Functionally primary stabilization: Functionally secondary stabilization:
